'''鈭歱-z-k''' ('''pazaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yiff|yiff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yiff|yiff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-z-k
|-
! Lemma
| pazaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pazakithi|pazakithi]] || [[word:pazakiji|pazakiji]] || [[word:pazakishi|pazakishi]] || [[word:pazaki|pazaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazakuthuth|pazakuthuth]] || [[word:pazakujuj|pazakujuj]] || [[word:pazakushush|pazakushush]] || [[word:pazak|pazak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazakuthu|pazakuthu]] || [[word:pazakuju|pazakuju]] || [[word:pazakushu|pazakushu]] || [[word:pazaku|pazaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazakufuth|pazakufuth]] || [[word:pazakufuj|pazakufuj]] || [[word:pazakufush|pazakufush]] || [[word:pazakuf|pazakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pazakethe|pazakethe]] || [[word:pazakeje|pazakeje]] || [[word:pazakeshe|pazakeshe]] || [[word:pazake|pazake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazakothoth|pazakothoth]] || [[word:pazakojoj|pazakojoj]] || [[word:pazakoshosh|pazakoshosh]] || [[word:pazak|pazak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazakotho|pazakotho]] || [[word:pazakojo|pazakojo]] || [[word:pazakosho|pazakosho]] || [[word:pazako|pazako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazakofoth|pazakofoth]] || [[word:pazakofoj|pazakofoj]] || [[word:pazakofosh|pazakofosh]] || [[word:pazakof|pazakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pazak忙th忙|pazak忙th忙]] || [[word:pazak忙j忙|pazak忙j忙]] || [[word:pazak忙sh忙|pazak忙sh忙]] || [[word:pazak忙|pazak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazakathath|pazakathath]] || [[word:pazakajaj|pazakajaj]] || [[word:pazakashash|pazakashash]] || [[word:pazak|pazak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazakatha|pazakatha]] || [[word:pazakaja|pazakaja]] || [[word:pazakasha|pazakasha]] || [[word:pazaka|pazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazakafath|pazakafath]] || [[word:pazakafaj|pazakafaj]] || [[word:pazakafash|pazakafash]] || [[word:pazakaf|pazakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pazakasha|pazakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopazakasha|gopazakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipazakasha|gokipazakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pazakn眉sha|pazakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopazaknkn眉sha|gopazaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipazakn眉sha|gokipazakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pazaksh毛sha|pazaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopazaknksh毛sha|gopazaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipazaksh毛sha|gokipazaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pazakrosha|pazakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopazaknkrosha|gopazaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipazakrosha|gokipazakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pazakmusha|pazakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazaknkmusha|gopazaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazakmusha|gokipazakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pazaksherasha|pazaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopazaknksherasha|gopazaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipazaksherasha|gokipazaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pazakngasha|pazakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopazaknkngasha|gopazaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipazakngasha|gokipazakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pazakyasha|pazakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopazaknkyasha|gopazaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipazakyasha|gokipazakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pazakyamasha|pazakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopazaknkyamasha|gopazaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipazakyamasha|gokipazakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pazakn眉sh毛sha|pazakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopazaknkn眉sh毛sha|gopazaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipazakn眉sh毛sha|gokipazakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pazakn眉rosha|pazakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopazaknkn眉rosha|gopazaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipazakn眉rosha|gokipazakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazakn眉musha|pazakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazaknkn眉musha|gopazaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazakn眉musha|gokipazakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pazaksh毛n眉sha|pazaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopazaknksh毛n眉sha|gopazaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipazaksh毛n眉sha|gokipazaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pazaksh毛rosha|pazaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopazaknksh毛rosha|gopazaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipazaksh毛rosha|gokipazaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazaksh毛musha|pazaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazaknksh毛musha|gopazaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazaksh毛musha|gokipazaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pazakron眉sha|pazakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopazaknkron眉sha|gopazaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipazakron眉sha|gokipazakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pazakrosh毛sha|pazakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopazaknkrosh毛sha|gopazaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipazakrosh毛sha|gokipazakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazakromusha|pazakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazaknkromusha|gopazaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazakromusha|gokipazakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pazakmun眉sha|pazakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopazaknkmun眉sha|gopazaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipazakmun眉sha|gokipazakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pazakmush毛sha|pazakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopazaknkmush毛sha|gopazaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipazakmush毛sha|gokipazakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pazakmurosha|pazakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopazaknkmurosha|gopazaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipazakmurosha|gokipazakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pazak|pazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙z忙k|p忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopazak|hopazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙z忙k|hop忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopazak|hohopazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙z忙k|hohop忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉pazak|n眉pazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙z忙k|n眉p忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉pazak|n眉n眉pazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙z忙k|n眉n眉p忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂pazak|n茂pazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙z忙k|n茂p忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂pazak|n茂n茂pazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙z忙k|n茂n茂p忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupazak|lupazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙z忙k|lup忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupazak|lulupazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙z忙k|lulup忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipazak|lipazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙z忙k|lip忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipazak|lilipazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙z忙k|lilip忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopazak|kopazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙z忙k|kop忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopazak|kokopazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙z忙k|kokop忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepazak|kepazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙z忙k|kep忙z忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepazak|kekepazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙z忙k|kekep忙z忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
